summary: Matched and linked the Link boomerang item translation unit by moving itlinkboomerang.c from NonMatching to Matching, adjusting Link boomerang attribute layout, refactoring several near-matching functions with small inline helpers and typed AnimBundle access, and updating symbols/data locality. The bot report records 6 new matches in main/melee/it/items/itlinkboomerang and linked-code/data gains.

key_files.role: Primary matched item TU; refactored boomerang spawn/physics helpers and reached 100% for 6 listed functions.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/items/itlinkboomerang.c added 58 deleted 40 hunks 12
diff_excerpt: itlinkboomerang.c changes around it_802A013C, itLinkboomerang_UnkMotion1_Phys, itLinkboomerang_UnkMotion2_Phys, it_802A13EC, itLinkboomerang_UnkMotion3_Phys, it_802A20E8
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists 6 new matches in main/melee/it/items/itlinkboomerang

key_files.role: Build configuration changed itlinkboomerang.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itlinkboomerang.c") changed to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itlinkboomerang.c")

key_files.role: Adjusted itLinkBoomerangAttributes layout by removing explicit matanim/shapeanim fields now represented by AnimBundle fields.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: removed x50_matanim, x54_shapeanim, x5C_matanim, x60_shapeanim from itLinkBoomerangAttributes

key_files.role: Updated symbol ownership/names for data, sdata, sdata2, and sbss entries affected by linking/matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: several it_/lbl_ global data symbols changed to local @ labels; added ...data.0; mnGallery_804D6C8C changed to rate_table

key_files.role: Touched sibling Link item source, but loaded diff excerpt does not show the hunks.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/items/itlinkhookshot.c added 7 deleted 7 hunks 3

key_files.role: Touched sibling Link item header, but loaded diff excerpt does not show the hunks.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/items/itlinkhookshot.h added 2 deleted 2 hunks 1

what_changed: Marked melee/it/items/itlinkboomerang.c as Matching in configure.py.

Changed it_802A013C and related setup code to use direct gobj->user_data in some places, removed an Item* pointer-walking pattern, indexed xDDC[i] and xF90[i] directly, and introduced it_802A013C_LoadAnim to load a joint and attach/request its AnimBundle.
Simplified itLinkBoomerangAttributes by keeping x4C_anim and x58_anim AnimBundle fields and removing the separate x50/x54/x5C/x60 matanim/shapeanim declarations.
Introduced several small static inline helpers in itlinkboomerang.c for field reads or expression shaping, including attrs->x18, ip->pos.x, and add-then-clamp behavior.
Adjusted a PAD_STACK use in it_802A013C from 4 to 8 bytes and changed local declaration order around SpawnItem/gobj.

Updated many symbols.txt entries from global/address-style data symbols to local @ labels for strings and float/double constants; also introduced a local ...data.0 label and renamed one sbss entry to rate_table.
Bot report recorded matched code +2848 bytes, linked code +9820 bytes, linked data +216 bytes, and 6 new full matches in itlinkboomerang.

smart_moves.text: The PR converted a pointer-walking loop over Item memory into indexed accesses to linkboomerang arrays, making the loop source-level while still matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: removed item_ptr and item_ptr = (Item*) ((s32*) item_ptr + 1); replaced xDDC[0]/xF90[0] through item_ptr with xDDC[i]/xF90[i]

smart_moves.text: The PR recovered the second boomerang animation as attrs->x58_anim instead of casting from an overlapping matanim field, aligning source with the AnimBundle abstraction.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: anim_bundle = (AnimBundle*) &attrs->x50_matanim replaced by anim_bundle = &attrs->x58_anim
diff_excerpt: removed x50_matanim/x54_shapeanim/x5C_matanim/x60_shapeanim from itLinkBoomerangAttributes

smart_moves.text: The PR localized many data constants in symbols.txt rather than keeping broad global labels for strings/floats that appear to be TU-local matching artifacts.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_804DCD68 and related sdata2 entries changed to @349, @350, etc. with scope:local
diff_excerpt: lbl_804D3AD0/lbl_804D3AD8 and it_804D5390/it_804D5398 changed to local @ labels

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a generated match uses pointer arithmetic to step through repeated fields inside a large struct, test whether the intended source is indexed access into arrays in the item variable substruct.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: item_ptr pointer stepping removed in it_802A013C and replaced with ip->xDD4_itemVar.linkboomerang.xDDC[i] and xF90[i]
decomp_standards:natural-loops
decomp_standards:typed-fields-over-pointer-math

decomp_lessons.lesson: If adjacent attribute fields form an AnimBundle, prefer representing the layout as AnimBundle fields and passing anim/matanim/shapeanim through that typed bundle instead of casting through individual component fields.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itLinkBoomerangAttributes retains x4C_anim and x58_anim while removing separate matanim/shapeanim fields
diff_excerpt: it_802A013C_LoadAnim uses anim_bundle->anim, anim_bundle->matanim, anim_bundle->shapeanim
decomp_standards:typed-fields-over-pointer-math

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small static inline helpers can be part of a matching strategy, but this PR only proves the final matched result, not that each helper is a general style preference.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: added itLinkboomerang_get_x18, it_802A13EC_inline, itLinkboomerang_UnkMotion3_Phys_add_clamp, it_802A20E8_inline
text_corpus: bot report shows affected functions reached 100%
decomp_standards:matching-tactics-need-evidence

naming_conventions.convention: For unowned local strings and float/double constants in symbols.txt, this PR used local @NNN labels with scope:local instead of global it_/lbl_ address names.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbl_804D83F0 through lbl_804D8434 changed to @254 through @328 with scope:local
diff_excerpt: it_804DCD68 through it_804DCDB4 changed to @349 through @925 with scope:local

naming_conventions.convention: The semantic sbss name rate_table was introduced for address 0x804D6C8C, replacing mnGallery_804D6C8C, but the loaded PR evidence does not explain the basis for that name.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnGallery_804D6C8C changed to rate_table

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK(8), local declaration ordering, direct gobj->user_data versus GET_ITEM in selected sites, and narrow static inline helpers to shape codegen for remaining near-matches.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: PAD_STACK(4) changed to PAD_STACK(8) in it_802A013C
diff_excerpt: Item* ip = GET_ITEM(gobj) changed to gobj->user_data in some functions, while one later function changed gobj->user_data to GET_ITEM(gobj)
diff_excerpt: multiple new static inline helpers added
text_corpus: bot report lists the relevant functions reaching 100%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The bot report verifies the final PR outcome, but the loaded slice does not isolate which individual tactic caused each match.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Restored a natural indexed loop for two boomerang model/animation slots rather than preserving pointer arithmetic over Item memory.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: for (i = 0; i < 2; i++) loop writes xDDC[i] and xF90[i]
diff_excerpt: removed item_ptr pointer increment
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Evidence is strong for this file, but not necessarily a universal rule outside similar repeated item-var fields.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching itLinkBoomerangAttributes or x58_anim to confirm the final intended layout.
Search for item_ptr pointer-walking over ItemVars arrays in item TUs and compare whether indexed array access also matches.
Search for rate_table at 0x804D6C8C to verify whether the semantic name has supporting source/data evidence.
Review full diff for src/melee/it/items/itlinkhookshot.c and itlinkhookshot.h because the loaded excerpt only provides metadata for those touched files.
Search for other PRs converting it_/lbl_ sdata2 float globals to local @ labels during matching/linking.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number/title/state/author/timestamps and changed file counts
human_pr_text: PR body with remaining item functions/TUs
raw_diff/diff_excerpt: core itlinkboomerang.c, configure.py, itCharItems.h, and symbols.txt hunks
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 showing 6 new matches and code/data deltas
changed_files.jsonl: all six changed file paths and hunk counts
notes: Strong evidence that itlinkboomerang.c was marked Matching and that 6 named functions became 100% matched according to the bot report.
Diff excerpt is truncated; itlinkhookshot.c and itlinkhookshot.h changed but their actual hunks are not visible in the loaded slice.
No review comments are present, so no reviewer feedback or reviewer intent can be inferred.
The PR uses matching tactics such as PAD_STACK and tiny inline helpers, but the loaded evidence does not isolate per-tactic objdiff effects.
Several symbols were localized or renamed; only the textual symbol changes are evidenced, not the rationale for every symbol ownership decision.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace pointer-walking over repeated ItemVars fields with indexed array accesses when the struct layout supports it
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2763 removed an Item* pointer-increment pattern in it_802A013C and used ip->xDD4_itemVar.linkboomerang.xDDC[i] and xF90[i] inside the existing two-iteration loop, contributing to a full match for it_802A013C.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802A013C loop replacement
text_corpus: bot report it_802A013C 99.80% to 100.00%

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use AnimBundle typed layout for adjacent animation component fields when supported
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2763 changed Link boomerang attribute access from separate/cast matanim and shapeanim fields to two AnimBundle fields, using attrs->x4C_anim and attrs->x58_anim with HSD_JObjAddAnimAll.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itCharItems.h removal of explicit matanim/shapeanim members
diff_excerpt: it_802A013C_LoadAnim

rejection_notes: Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; there are no review comments in the loaded slice.
Do not generalize PAD_STACK(8) or tiny inline accessors as accepted style from this PR alone; the evidence shows final matches but not isolated necessity.
Do not treat hookshot changes as lessons from this slice because only changed-file metadata is loaded, not the actual hookshot hunks.
Do not promote every symbols.txt localization or the rate_table rename as a global naming convention without additional symbol ownership evidence.
